category_sources: Official Tailscale site describes a Zero Trust identity-based connectivity platform replacing legacy VPN and connecting multi-cloud, remote teams, CI/CD, Edge and IoT devices.
display_name_sources: Official website and docs navigation use "Tailscale".
docs_sources: Official website has a dedicated Docs section at tailscale.com/docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/tailscale/tailscale; per instruction repo is returned as null when already supplied.
tags_sources: Official website describes VPN replacement, WireGuard association, Zero Trust networking, mesh overlay networking, and remote/infrastructure access.
